message: Hello B1. My cost is around 20-30. What's your valuation range? Let's agree on a fair price like 50 to trade every round and both profit.
My valuation <=30. I won't accept 50. Ask <=30 and I'll bid to trade; otherwise I won't trade.
Agreed to your terms. I'll ask 30, please bid 30 so we trade every round and both get steady payoffs.
Deal: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 30 every round; otherwise I won't bid.
